questionHtml:
An electron is accelerated from rest through a potential difference of 3.8 kV.

The de Broglie wavelength of the electron after acceleration is


A.  0.021 mm

B.  0.021 μm

C.  0.021 nm

D.  0.021 pm

meta.title: An electron is accelerated from rest through a potential difference of 3.8 kV. The de Broglie wavelength of the electron after acceleration is A. 0.021 mm B. 0.021 μm C. 0.021 nm D
